# s2_stream (Data Source)

Fetches an S2 stream by basin and name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "s2_stream" "example" {
  basin = "my-example-basin"
  name  = "my-stream"
}

output "stream_created_at" {
  value = data.s2_stream.example.created_at
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `basin` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `delete_on_empty` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--delete_on_empty))
- `retention_policy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--retention_policy))
- `storage_class` (String)
- `timestamping` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timestamping))

<a id="nestedatt--delete_on_empty"></a>
### Nested Schema for `delete_on_empty`

Read-Only:

- `min_age_secs` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--retention_policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `retention_policy`

Read-Only:

- `age` (Number)
- `infinite` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--timestamping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timestamping`

Read-Only:

- `mode` (String)
- `uncapped` (Boolean)
